synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-2799 Moderate: Oracle Linux 9 php security update
description:
[8.0.30-5]
- Fix Null byte termination in dns_get_record()
  GHSA-www2-q4fc-65wf
- Fix Heap buffer overflow in array_merge()
  CVE-2025-14178
- Fix Information Leak of Memory in getimagesize
  CVE-2025-14177
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-2799

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2799.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:

- Fix Null byte termination in dns_get_record()
